title: salvia × sylvestris var. barcinonensis
intro: Salvia × sylvestris var. barcinonensis, also known as Spanish sage, is a perennial plant from the Salvia genus that is native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of France. The medicinal properties of Salvia × sylvestris var. barcinonensis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and aiding in the management of symptoms associated with menopause. Herbal preparations of Salvia × sylvestris var. barcinonensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
